Container.Name: quad-fighter-server
Container.Overview: Headless authoritative game server for Quad Fighter – a side-scrolling arcade beat-em-up. Exposes a TCP server that clients connect to for networked multiplayer sessions (up to 4 players).

Config.Name: Game Server Port
Config.Description: Host TCP port that Quad Fighter clients connect to.

Config.Name: QUAD_SERVER_HOST
Config.Description: Interface the server binds to inside the container (0.0.0.0 = all interfaces).

Config.Name: QUAD_SERVER_PORT
Config.Description: TCP port the server listens on inside the container. Keep in sync with the port mapping above.

Config.Name: QUAD_TICK_RATE
Config.Description: State broadcast frequency in Hz (ticks per second).
